description: A patient has a large, old balance and has not responded to multiple statements. The account needs to be sent to a third-party collections agency.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient account that meets the criteria for being sent to collections (e.g., >120 days old).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the delinquent account in a work queue.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the proper number of statements and letters have been sent.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the account has been through the standard internal collections cycle.

nodes.task_description: Assign the account to the external collections agency in the system.

expected_outcome.value: The account is electronically transferred to the collections agency, and the balance is moved to a 'collections' financial class.
